info.title: Erlume Backend API
info.description:
REST API for Erlume. Use this spec in Backoffice / Admin dashboard for documentation, code generation, or API clients. All IDs are MongoDB ObjectIds unless noted. List endpoints support date filters (year, month) where applicable.

**Audience:** Each path has `x-usedBy` indicating who consumes it: `backoffice` (admin dashboard only), `frontend` (customer-facing website only), or `both`. Use this to avoid exposing admin-only fields to the frontend and to document which endpoints each app should call. See docs/API_AND_FIELD_AUDIENCE.md for full endpoint and field-level audience.

x-audience-convention.description: Marks which client(s) use each path. Use the same values in field-level docs.

usedBy.backoffice: Admin dashboard (erlume-backoffice). Full CRUD, internal data, seller/user management.
usedBy.frontend: Customer-facing website. Catalog, checkout, my orders, reviews, discount validation.
usedBy.both: Used by both backoffice and frontend. Catalog, orders, shared lookups.

tags.name: Users
tags.description: User accounts only (login, roles, soft-delete). For seller profile (bank, policy, escalation) use Sellers.

tags.name: Sellers
tags.description: Seller profiles only. Use PUT/PATCH /api/sellers/{id} for all seller updates — do not use /api/users for seller data.

tags.name: Incomes
tags.description: Income records: Erlume commission, income (sale amount), seller payout per sale/item. Single source for commission breakdown and payout tracking.

put.summary: Update user (full) — user account only, not seller profile
put.description: Updates user fields only. For seller profile use PATCH /api/sellers/{id}.

patch.summary: Update user (partial) — user account only; e.g. soft delete
patch.description: User account only. Use for isDeleted, etc. For seller profile use PATCH /api/sellers/{id}.

isDeleted.description: Set true to soft-delete user. Backoffice uses this for Delete button.

delete.summary: Delete user (hard). Backoffice uses PATCH with isDeleted for soft delete.

get.summary: Get seller by id (seller _id or user ID)

put.description: Single endpoint for seller profile. Id = seller _id or user ID. Use this, not /api/users, for seller updates.

patch.description: Single endpoint for seller profile updates. Id = seller _id or user ID.

patch.summary: Update order (partial: order_status, deliveryDate, deliveryStatus, trackingReference)

put.summary: Update expense (name, cost, currency, employee_id, notes, type, month, paidBy, isRecurring, phase)

get.summary: List incomes (commission breakdown: Erlume commission, income amount, seller payout). Filter by orderId, itemId, sellerId, year, month.

post.summary: Create income (supports amount, erlumeCommissionAmount, sellerPayoutAmount, links to order/item/seller)

patch.summary: Update income (patch: amount, erlumeCommissionAmount, sellerPayoutAmount, etc.)

get.summary: List credit cards by user id
Get enum by category (orderStatus, itemStatus, authenticationStatus, returnStatus, deliveryStatus, escalationStatus, bagBrand, etc.)
